metadata.description: Micro-app authoring tools — the micro-app-template-gen Claude Code skill that walks an SME through producing a valid micro-app-template.json artifact. Companion to the Locksmith wallet plugin in this repo.

plugins.name: micro-app-template-gen
plugins.description: Guided 10-step authoring of micro-app templates: one role's slice of one use case, expressed as a JSON artifact on top of KERI primitives (exn, IPEX, ACDC, TEL). Includes worked examples, naming conventions, UEL/1.0 cheat-sheet, and an adversarial review checklist.
